flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fortis College-Baton Rouge fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: For-profit certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Fortis College-Baton Rouge are 48% above the for-profit certificate-predominant peer median ($32.9k vs $22.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Fortis College-Baton Rouge rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (49.1% → 63.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fortis College-Baton Rouge rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (387 → 482).
